meta.note: Offline, curated CVE catalog for libraries commonly bundled in Windows thick-client apps. Version ranges are best-effort -- always confirm against the linked NVD/GHSA advisory before reporting. 'ecosystem' is 'nuget' (matched by *.deps.json + the recon SDK inventory) or 'native' (matched by shipped DLL filename + FileVersion). 'below' is the first FIXED version: a shipped version < below is vulnerable.
meta.disclaimer: This catalog enables version-presence detection only. It does NOT ship weaponized exploits. Exploitability is verified locally against an authorized target via the gated Exploit bucket.

cves.title: Newtonsoft.Json StackOverflow / DoS on deeply nested JSON
cves.summary: Improper handling of exceptional conditions when deserializing deeply nested JSON causes a StackOverflow crash (DoS). RCE-adjacent when combined with TypeNameHandling.

exploit.guide: If any reachable endpoint calls JsonConvert.DeserializeObject on attacker JSON, post a deeply nested array ([[[[...]]]]) to crash, or a $type gadget if TypeNameHandling != None.

cves.title: System.Text.Json DoS via crafted JSON (async)
cves.summary: A crafted payload to JsonSerializer async APIs can cause excessive resource consumption / hang (DoS). Also affects 6.0.x < 6.0.10.

exploit.guide: Confirm an endpoint uses System.Text.Json async deserialization on untrusted input; send the crafted payload from the advisory.

cves.title: SqlClient TLS man-in-the-middle / information disclosure
cves.summary: A MITM can force a downgrade and read/modify data between the app and SQL Server because the channel is not always validated. Also fixed in 2.1.7 / 3.1.5 / 4.0.5 / 4.1.1.

exploit.guide: Position a TLS MITM (Test-TcpkTlsPinning shows pinning posture); if the connection succeeds with a forged cert, the channel is downgradable.

cves.title: BouncyCastle RSA timing side-channel (Bleichenbacher)
cves.summary: Timing variation in RSA decryption (TLS RSA key exchange) allows a Bleichenbacher-style oracle. Fixed in 2.3.1.

cves.title: BouncyCastle ECDSA crafted-key DoS (OOM)
cves.summary: Importing an EC certificate/public key with crafted F2m parameters causes excessive CPU/memory (DoS). Fixed in 2.3.1.

cves.title: SSH.NET ssh-ed25519 nonce reuse
cves.summary: Under specific conditions the same nonce is reused for ssh-ed25519 signatures, weakening key secrecy. Fixed in 2020.0.2.

cves.title: Terrapin SSH prefix-truncation (affects SSH.NET)
cves.summary: The SSH transport (ChaCha20-Poly1305 / CBC-EtM) is susceptible to prefix truncation, letting a MITM strip extension-negotiation messages. Ecosystem-wide (Terrapin).

cves.title: System.Drawing.Common GDI+ remote code execution
cves.summary: Use-after-free in GDI+ when processing a crafted image (e.g. EMF/metafile) can lead to RCE. Fixed in 4.7.2 / 5.0.x.

exploit.guide: If the app loads images from untrusted sources via System.Drawing, feed the crafted metafile from the advisory.

cves.title: RestSharp ReDoS in date/header parsing
cves.summary: A regular expression used to parse server responses is susceptible to catastrophic backtracking (ReDoS) from a malicious server. Fixed in 106.13.0.

cves.title: ImageSharp DoS via crafted image
cves.summary: A crafted image triggers an unhandled condition / excessive processing (DoS). Confirm exact branch (2.1.5 vs 3.0.1).

cves.title: log4net XML external entity (XXE) in config parsing
cves.summary: log4net does not disable XML external entities when parsing its config, allowing XXE if the config is attacker-influenced. Fixed in 2.0.10.

cves.title: Protobuf null-pointer / DoS on crafted message
cves.summary: Incorrect handling of unknown fields / null in protobuf can crash the parser (DoS). Fixed in 3.15.0.

cves.title: Microsoft IdentityModel JWT DoS
cves.summary: A crafted JWT can cause excessive resource consumption during validation (DoS). Fixed in 7.1.2.

cves.title: libwebp heap buffer overflow (BLASTPASS, actively exploited)
cves.summary: Heap buffer overflow in WebP lossless (VP8L) decoding. Actively exploited 0-day (CISA KEV). Frequently STATICALLY LINKED into Chromium/WebView2, Skia, Electron and image libraries -- the standalone DLL may not be present; verify the embedding library's build.

exploit.note: Often embedded; check libSkiaSharp / WebView2 / Electron WebP build date.

cves.title: zlib heap buffer over-read/overflow in inflateGetHeader
cves.summary: A crafted gzip header with a large extra field overflows in inflate(). Ubiquitous; often statically linked.

exploit.note: Frequently embedded; check via the consuming library.

cves.title: HarfBuzz unbounded recursion / DoS on crafted font
cves.summary: A crafted font can cause excessive memory consumption (O(n^2)) in hb-ot-layout (DoS). harfbuzz < 6.0.0. Map the HarfBuzzSharp wrapper version to the embedded harfbuzz build.

cves.title: FreeType buffer overflow in sfnt_init_face
cves.summary: Heap buffer overflow parsing a crafted font; RCE potential. freetype < 2.12.1.

cves.title: SQLite array-bounds overflow (large string input)
cves.summary: An array-bounds overflow when very large string inputs are passed to certain printf-style APIs. sqlite3 < 3.39.2.

cves.title: expat use-after-free in doContent
cves.summary: Use-after-free parsing crafted XML; RCE potential. expat < 2.4.9.

cves.title: curl SOCKS5 heap buffer overflow
cves.summary: A long hostname during SOCKS5 proxy handshake overflows a heap buffer. libcurl < 8.4.0.

cves.title: libxml2 integer overflow (XML_PARSE_HUGE)
cves.summary: Integer overflow parsing very large XML with XML_PARSE_HUGE; memory corruption. libxml2 < 2.10.3.

cves.title: OpenSSL X.400 address type confusion (GENERAL_NAME_cmp)
cves.summary: Type confusion in X.400 address processing during X.509 GENERAL_NAME comparison; potential RCE/DoS. openssl < 3.0.8 (also 1.1.1 branch).

cves.title: jQuery cross-site scripting via cross-domain ajax
cves.summary: jQuery < 3.0.0 executes text/javascript responses from cross-domain ajax (XSS). Relevant if the app bundles old jQuery in a WebView2/embedded web UI.

cves.title: jQuery passing HTML with <option> to DOM methods (XSS)
cves.summary: jQuery < 3.5.0 can execute untrusted code when HTML containing <option> elements is passed to manipulation methods. Relevant for embedded web UIs.
